# Thomas Lamothe

> Thomas Lamothe is a French Software Developer based in Toulouse, specializing in full-stack web development and SaaS platforms.

## About
Thomas is a software developer with a background in building and maintaining global SaaS platforms. He is currently a Software Developer II at Mailjet by Sinch and has experience as a Tech Lead and Freelance Developer. Outside of coding, he is a musician, skateboarder, and open-source contributor.

## Technical Stack
- **Languages/Frameworks:** PHP (Symfony, Laravel, Laminas), React (React Router, Next.js), Vue.js, Tailwind CSS
- **Infrastructure/Tools:** Docker, AWS, Redis
- **Methodologies:** Full-stack development, SaaS maintenance, Open Source, APIs

## Experience
- **Mailjet by Sinch** (2026 – Present): Software Developer II (Remote)
- **Iwit Systems** (2020 – 2026): Web Tech Lead Developer in Toulouse
- **Freelance** (2017 – 2022): Full-Stack Developer
- **Mipih** (2019): Web Development Intern

## Education
- **Dual Bachelor in Computer Engineering** (2020 – 2021) - Paul Sabatier College
- **Professional Bachelor in Computer Science** (2019 – 2020) - Toulouse's Capitole College
- **Associate's Degree in Computer Science** (2017 – 2019) - Paul Sabatier Technology Institute

## Contact & Socials
- **Location:** Toulouse, France
- **Website:** [thomaslamothe.com](https://thomaslamothe.com)
